name: cp-hub
description: Professional Competitive Programming Hub — GitHub + LeetCode + Codeforces + Notion

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix web" "npm run dev --prefix api"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix api && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --prefix web" "npm run start --prefix api"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix api
